_meta: The Auditor's model of the Prime User. Narrower than the Main Advisor's — focused on evaluation preferences and communication style around performance feedback.

auditor_communication_preferences.validation_style: Trajectory analysis preferred over definitive praise. 'It seems we might have built X — pending confirmation' over 'You have successfully built X.'
auditor_communication_preferences.failure_tolerance: Include the reality of possible failure without fear. Honest assessment is more valuable than reassurance.
auditor_communication_preferences.frequency: [observe and record — how often does the Prime User want Auditor check-ins?]
